idea-plugin.name: Catylst KMP Starter
idea-plugin.description:
Generate a production-ready Kotlin Multiplatform project with a guided wizard.
Supports Android, iOS, and Desktop targets with optional features including Room, Ktor, AI integration, push notifications, permissions, and more.

Use File → New → Catylst KMP Project… to get started.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.5
  • Faster mouse-wheel scrolling in the project wizard.
  • Package name now auto-corrects from the application name, and clears when the name is emptied.
  • Generated projects no longer ship a stale local.properties — Android Studio regenerates it on import.

action.description: Create a new Kotlin Multiplatform project with Catylst
Create a new Kotlin Multiplatform project with Catylst
